inputs.label: Power (Watts)
inputs.businessContext: Input power in watts (e.g., electrical device rating).

inputs.label: Time (seconds)
inputs.businessContext: Duration of power application in seconds.

inputs.label: Joules per calorie
inputs.businessContext: Energy equivalent: 4.184 J per small calorie, 4184 J per kilocalorie (dietary Calorie).

inputs.label: Efficiency (%)
inputs.businessContext: Conversion efficiency from electrical power to heat/calories. 100% means all watts converted.
